notes: Pure WDM cancel-safe IRP queue driver. Callbacks registered via DriverObject->MajorFunction[] assignment and PsCreateSystemThread — both are WDM function-pointer registration patterns invisible to the scanner's EVT_WDF registry approach. This file is used as evidence for/against whether the WDM cast detection gap is universal or kbfiltr-specific.

CsampCreateClose.label: dispatch
CsampCreateClose.notes: Registered as MajorFunction[IRP_MJ_CREATE] and MajorFunction[IRP_MJ_CLOSE]. WDM IRP dispatch routine. Scanner expected to misclassify as 'other' — WDM MajorFunction[] assignment not tracked.

CsampRead.label: dispatch
CsampRead.notes: Registered as MajorFunction[IRP_MJ_READ]. WDM IRP dispatch routine. Same blind spot as CsampCreateClose.

CsampCleanup.label: dispatch
CsampCleanup.notes: Registered as MajorFunction[IRP_MJ_CLEANUP]. WDM IRP dispatch routine. Same blind spot.

CsampUnload.label: other
CsampUnload.notes: DriverObject->DriverUnload — driver unload routine, PASSIVE_LEVEL. Not an interrupt-path callback; out of isr/dpc/dispatch scope.

CsampPollingThread.label: other
CsampPollingThread.notes: Registered via PsCreateSystemThread — KSTART_ROUTINE, runs at PASSIVE_LEVEL as a system thread. Not an interrupt callback; correct label is 'other' regardless of WDM cast gap.

CsampPollDevice.label: other
CsampPollDevice.notes: Internal polling helper called from CsampPollingThread. Not a registered callback.

CsampInsertIrp.label: other
CsampInsertIrp.notes: IoCsq InsertIrp callback — runs at DISPATCH_LEVEL (queue spinlock held). Not an IRP dispatch routine in the MajorFunction sense; queue management callback, out of scope for isr/dpc/dispatch classification.

CsampRemoveIrp.label: other
CsampRemoveIrp.notes: IoCsq RemoveIrp callback — DISPATCH_LEVEL. Same rationale as CsampInsertIrp.

CsampPeekNextIrp.label: other
CsampPeekNextIrp.notes: IoCsq PeekNextIrp callback — DISPATCH_LEVEL. Same rationale.

CsampReleaseLock.label: other
CsampReleaseLock.notes: IoCsq ReleaseLock callback — releases the queue spinlock. DISPATCH_LEVEL. Queue management, out of scope.

CsampCompleteCanceledIrp.label: other
CsampCompleteCanceledIrp.notes: IoCsq CompleteCancelledIrp callback — called when IRP is cancelled. Not an interrupt-path callback.
